pageContext.name: Pukei-Pukei
pageContext.description: As a hunter, you'll take on quests to hunt monsters in a variety of habitats.   PureArts, in collaboration with Capcom, is thrilled to present the Pukei-Pukei Statue! Flying in from the forested lands of Monster Hunter World and sitting atop a beautifully detailed environment base, this statue measures over 17 inches tall and features dazzling iridescent colors and stunningly life-like elements from top to bottom.  Fans of Monster Hunter and the hit action role-playing game Monster Hunter World will love every inch of this colorful Bird Wyvern! Be sure to add to your collection today!
